name: Natural Woven Round Storage Bin with Coiled Rope Handle - Cloud Island™ L
description:
Your kid's space won't be messy anymore when you add this Natural Woven Round Storage Bin with Coiled Rope Handle from cloud island™. This round storage bin features the appeal of a textured woven design and artful style that makes it a beautiful addition to their decor. Coiled rope in white, yellow and blue along the rim provides a colorful look that complements its natural shade. Use this large storage bin to stash away blankets, toys and other items to help keep their space neat and tidy. You can also add other woven storage bins of varying sizes and designs to create a coordinated look while giving their room extra storage space.


cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
